response.justification: Candidate is a skilled full-stack software craftsman with ~13 years of experience, but the role requires 15 years and Director-level individual contributor seniority with recognized AI expertise. Resume shows only recent, limited exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025) and no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or thought leadership at the scale expected for a Principal Engineer setting AI strategy. No cloud-platform strategy work, no advising of strategic customers, and no track record of inspiring industry-wide adoption.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Some recent AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public talks
concerns: Falls short of 15-year requirement and Director-level IC seniority
No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise
No evidence of cloud strategy work or advising strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC / Principal scope
